name: Bhai Nand Singh (Delhi)
body: Bhai Nand Singh Ji was born in the city of Jhang, which is now located in Pakistan since the partition in 1947. During that time of unrest, his family moved to Alahar, Haryana where he grew up with 8 brothers and 1 sister. Due to an illness, he lost his eyesight when he was 6 years old. His parents decided to send him to Yamunanagar under the care of Sant Nischal Singh Ji, so that he may gain spiritual knowledge. When they approached Sant Nischal Singh Ji with their request, he told them that they had brought him a diamond, and now it was his duty to polish this diamond.

Bhai Nand Singh Ji was under the care of Sant Nischal Singh Ji for 28 years and during this time, he was given many tasks to develop interest in ‘Naam’. Slowly, the desire for ‘Naam’ grew within him and he would sit all day in remembrance of Waheguru. Once, he even went into the jungles of Machhiwara and lived there for 3 years, all the while meditating. Keep in mind that this is not an easy task even for a person with eyesight, let alone for someone who is blind. Pleased with the progress of Bhai Nand Singh, Sant Nischal Singh Ji asked what does his heart desire most, to which he replied, “Please bless me with the gift of Kirtan”. Bhai Nand Singh Ji spent many years learning Kirtan from Sant Nischal Singh Ji.

Having done years of meditation himself, Bhai Nand Singh Ji also had many saintly qualities. However, he was not the type to let it be known. He always kept to himself and only spoke when spoken to. Otherwise, he would be constantly doing Simran. These qualities certainly had an impact on his Kirtan. He was always able to captivate the Sangat with his sweet voice and simple style which appealed to many. He also had a gift in delivering Katha. Bhai Nand Singh Ji performed Kirtan in Gurdwara Bangla Sahib, Delhi for many years. Whenever it was his duty for Kirtan, crowds used to gather to listen to him. At times, there would not be a place to sit even in the ‘Parkarma’ area.

Bhai Nand Singh Ji has also taught Kirtan to many, including the renowned Kirtani, Bhai Jasbir Singh Ji (Paonta Sahib). Bhai Nand Singh Ji has also travelled to the United States, United Kingdom, Singapore, Thailand and Malaysia. The information above was obtained from Veer Harkaran Singh from Chandigarh.
